behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names client-fixture.mjs, bake-harness.ts, loadPage(), unhandledRejection handler, this.output.exitCode, and reloadFailed semantics — all paths/symbols referenced by tests are mentioned.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes what is broken (no retry, null content-type, missing handler, etc.) without giving exact code to write.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check behaviors (>=3 retries, null content-type handled, exit code 34, this.output.exitCode assignment with proc.exited) which any correct fix would satisfy; no gold-specific variable names asserted.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests extract loadPage and execute it against a real HTTP server, run node subprocesses to test unhandledRejection behavior.

test_not_tautological.reason: Anti-stub checks (req>=1, req>=3, exit code 34) require actual fix behavior; stubs cannot satisfy them.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Each of the 5 issues in instruction.md maps to a test (null-ct, retry, unhandledRejection, initial wrap implicit via no-crash, exit code propagation).

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests have docstrings and section comments separating gate/f2p tests.

no_typos.reason: Paths and identifiers consistent across instruction, tests, and solution.

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names files and approximate line (around 817) which is reasonable scoping; doesn't dictate exact code.
